rag_rules: Generate AGREE annex blocks only for component type or implementation scope as dictated by AADL scope rules.
Use only visible ports and features from the AADL model in assumptions and guarantees; avoid subcomponent paths in type-level annexes.
generic_rules: Relate visible inputs to visible outputs in guarantees without introducing implementation-specific references.
Declare constants and equations using only AGREE scalar types: int, real, and bool.
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Enclose AGREE annex content within `annex agree {** ... **};`.
Use exact Boolean expressions for bool ports; avoid numeric encoding of event or opaque ports.
anti_patterns: Do not reference subcomponent ports or implementation-only identifiers in component type annexes.
Do not convert Boolean or event ports into integers or numeric comparisons unless explicitly typed as data ports with scalar types.
